# Welcome

> These are the docs & plans for Cinebara.

- [Nodes](https://docs.cinebara.com/nodes/nodes.md): The building block of a Stage, Nodes provide structure and behaviour and are oganized in a tree.
- [Welcome](https://docs.cinebara.com/readme.md): Welcome
- [Entities](https://docs.cinebara.com/entities.md): An entity is some separate tree that does not exist in a Stage's tree but is referenced by some node within the Stage's tree. The node that sits in the
- [Features](https://docs.cinebara.com/features.md): A list of features that are either planned or implemented.
- [Input](https://docs.cinebara.com/input.md): Raw inputs are transformed into Actions via a series of Action Generators. An Action Generator can be though of as a keybind, something that turns a raw input concept (Like pressing the W key) into an Action with a purpose (Like "move forward").
- [Interface](https://docs.cinebara.com/interface.md): UI is not yet implemented
- [Rendering](https://docs.cinebara.com/rendering/rendering.md): Describes the general process for rendering the Cinebara window.
- [Security](https://docs.cinebara.com/security.md): Promises, contracts, and disclaimers that curious users may be interested to know about.
- [Sessions](https://docs.cinebara.com/sessions.md): A container for a Stage to be performed on or edited by networked collaborators.
- [Stages](https://docs.cinebara.com/stages.md): An environment to build or perform on.
- [UI](https://docs.cinebara.com/ui/ui.md): In many different UI layouts, items are placed side-by-side and then distributed and aligned in some manner. For this layout system, we have constructed some generic primitives that accomplish this and are used by all layout modes, to handle these common behaviors in a unified way.

## Nodes

- [Camera](https://docs.cinebara.com/nodes/camera.md): Defines a view into a stage. As it stands, a camera supports either Orthographic of Perspective projections but other projections will likely be added with time.
- [Label](https://docs.cinebara.com/nodes/label.md): Provides a name for a specific branch of a tree. It is useful for organization.
- [Transform 3D (Node)](https://docs.cinebara.com/nodes/transform_3d.md): Provides a 3D transformation to all Nodes under it.
- [Viewport (Node)](https://docs.cinebara.com/nodes/viewport.md): Provides a render target that can be drawn onto by other nodes. Paired with a Camera, it can supply a view into a Stage.
